subject: Sprint 3 progress — cloud shadows + TAA
body:
Progress update:

✅ Cloud shadow projection (src/scene/CloudShadow.ts)
  - Projects cloud coverage onto globe surface
  - Multiply blending for natural shadow darkening
  - Sun angle affects shadow intensity
  - Synced with globe rotation

✅ Temporal accumulation (TAA) for clouds
  - History render target for previous frame
  - Blend shader combines current + history
  - Blue noise jitter for subpixel variation
  - Adaptive blend factor (more at start, less when moving)
  - Reduces cloud noise while maintaining detail

🔄 Next:
- Visual polish (contrast, colors)
- Performance optimizations
- WebSocket for real-time updates

Build: TypeScript clean, Vite 526KB (134KB gzip)

Your cloud shader improvements look great with TAA!
